meta.title: EmbedPress Live Demo
meta.description: Try EmbedPress in your browser — a curated demo page showcasing embeds from popular providers.
meta.author: WPDeveloper

options.blogdescription: Embed any media in WordPress with one click

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$page = get_page_by_path('embedpress-live-demo');
if (!$page) {
    $pages = get_posts(['post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'numberposts' => 1, 'orderby' => 'date', 'order' => 'DESC']);
    $page = $pages[0] ?? null;
}
if ($page) {
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    update_option('page_on_front', $page->ID);
}
